description_long: This object consists of two muffins placed side by side, each topped with a generous swirl of white frosting. The frosting is piped in a spiral pattern, creating a soft, voluminous peak on each muffin. The muffins are encased in metallic, vertically striped wrappers with alternating silver and purple hues, giving them a festive appearance. The cake portion beneath the frosting appears to be a reddish-brown color, suggesting a possible red velvet or similar flavor. There are no visible toppings or decorative elements on the frosting, and the muffins are presented against a plain white background with no visible support or plate. The overall look is clean, modern, and appetizing, suitable for display in a bakery or urban café setting.
description: Two muffins with swirled white frosting and metallic striped wrappers, side by side. The muffins have a reddish-brown cake base and no visible toppings or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing both muffins side by side, highlighting the spiral white frosting and the metallic striped wrappers.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the swirled pattern of the frosting and the close proximity of the two muffins.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the backs of the muffins and the continuity of the striped wrappers.
description_view_3: Back view with both muffins aligned, focusing on the symmetry of the frosting swirls and the wrapper design.
